---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: Raven Dawson
---

# loading libraries

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```


- read in data

```{r}
lobster_traps <- read_csv("../data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")
```
- looking at the data

```{r}
head(lobster_traps)

```
# 1

```{r}
unique(lobster_traps$TRAPS)
```

```{r}
lob_clean <- lobster_traps %>%
  mutate(TRAPS = ifelse(TRAPS == -99999, NA, TRAPS))
```

```{r}
unique(lob_clean$TRAPS)
```

# 2
```{r}
no_NAPL <- lob_clean %>% 
  filter(SITE != "NAPL")

unique(no_NAPL$SITE)
unique(lob_clean$SITE)
```

# 3
```{r}
CARP_20 <- lob_clean %>% 
  filter(SITE == "CARP" & TRAPS > 20)

```

# 4 
```{r}
max_lob <- lob_clean %>%
  group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>%
  summarise(max_traps = max(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))
```
